name: Aria Nightwind
bio: Aria is a scout from the highlands, known for her keen eyes and companionship with a hawk named Soot. She left home at a young age to pursue the sky and the secrets it holds.

name: Kiro Emberfist
bio: Kiro is a wandering fighter with a temper matched only by his loyalty. His years at the frontier have forged him into a reliable companion in battle.

name: Lumi Vale
bio: Lumi studies at the glass towers, always chasing ephemeral light. Her spells are bright — and sometimes distractingly loud.
